description: Style Note Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Roque floaters from puma. This pair can be teamed with shorts or denims, and tees for a casual ensemble. Product Details Synthetic uppers with synthetic woven tape straps on the forefoot and ankle attached by a diagonal strap across the midfoot Velcro strap enclosures on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug Fit Logo name on the ankle strap, cat logo on the midfoot diagonal strap and brand name on the pull tab Lightly cushioned lining for better comfort Cushioned foam footbed with pattern for all-day comfort Rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs for superior grip Material and Care Synthetic Wipe surface with a clean and dry cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner and polish or wax on leather parts Do not store in direct sunlight
